---
title: "Yakun Zhou"
image: images/Eportfolio_photo.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yakun-zhou-5a0686237/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/YakunZhou
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:yk0411@student.ubc.ca
---

# Yakun Zhou

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management Candidate**

Welcome to my E-Portfolio. This site showcases selected academic and technical work completed during the Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management program at the University of British Columbia. My interests focus on GIS, spatial analysis, environmental risk assessment, and geospatial decision support.

## About Me

I am a geomatics and environmental management student with experience in ArcGIS Pro, remote sensing, spatial analysis, and map-based communication. Through the MGEM program, I have worked on projects involving wildfire risk mapping, environmental analysis, and geospatial data interpretation.

## Portfolio Highlights

This portfolio includes selected projects that demonstrate my development in:

-   GIS-based spatial analysis

-   Wildfire risk modelling

-   Environmental planning support

-   Data visualization and communication
